arts.ttl: Tuchel backlash increases Eddie Howe's chances of England job despite FA snub
arts.sum: Eddie Howe may not have even been interviewed for the England job this time around but don't bet against the Newcastle United boss being the man to replace Thomas Tuchel should it all go wrong for the German coach in the next 18 months. The former Chelsea boss' appointment this week ends the already withering speculation over Howe possibly swapping St James' Park for Wembley following Gareth Southgate's summer exit.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Brighton test as Eddie Howe handed injury boost
arts.sum: Miguel Almiron, Harvey Barnes, Jacob Murphy and Anthony Gordon are all competing for the wide roles and, even discounting Miley, Howe has five strong midfield options in Bruno Guimaraes, Sandro Tonali, Joelinton, Sean Longstaff and Joe Willock. It might be a'simple' case of one in, one out for Eddie Howe and Newcastle United as he makes the final preparations for today's Premier League game with Brighton and Hove Albion.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Brighton TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Newcastle United return to Premier League action against Brighton and Hove Albion today looking for their first win in three league games - but with a chance to move into the top four. Eddie Howe's side have only lost once all season but will be keen to build on draws with Manchester City and Everton and continue their strong home form against a Brighton side who have also started well.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs The post Newcastle v Brighton: FPL team news + predicted line-ups appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Newcastle to make renewed Guehi bid - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Newcastle keen to sign Marc Guehi in January, Chelsea will rebuff all offers for Cole Palmer and Manchester City to battle Bayern Munich for Florian Wirtz.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes brutally honest admission as Tottenham boss vows to end club's fragile reputation after Brighton capitulation
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Accusations of 'Spursiness' returned after the collapse from 2-0 up at half-time to a 3-2 defeat at Brighton on their last outing rekindled the criticism of Antonio Conte.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton both agree over 'difficult' Newcastle v Brighton result prediction
arts.sum: Newcastle United will return to Premier League action after the international break with a difficult fixture against Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday. The Magpies...

arts.ttl: Italian journalist “would bet” £55m Newcastle star joins AC Milan
arts.sum: Italian journalist Carlo Pellegatti believes Newcastle star Sandro Tonali will return to AC Milan in the future but admits he doesn’t know when that will be. The 24-year-old completed a move from the Serie A giants last summer as part of a £55m deal but his time in England has not gone according to plan. […] The post Italian journalist “would bet” £55m Newcastle star joins AC Milan appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs Brighton prediction made as Alan Shearer offers 'high line' verdict
arts.sum: "If reports are to be true, that Newcastle have at least one of Callum Wilson or Aleksandar Isak back, then the chances they create combined with the way Brighton play with a high-line, means I will predict a home win at St James' Park." United have Alexander Isak available, something which Newcastle goalscoring hero Alan Shearer feels will be vital, but are without Kieran Trippier, while Callum Wilson looks set to again miss out.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Brighton with Isak back and Gordon dilemma
arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted line-up vs Brighton: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Tonali, Guimaraes, Joelinton; Barnes, Gordon, Isak. It might be less about which players Eddie Howe picks to start Newcastle United's Premier League game with Brighton and Hove Albion this weekend, and more about how they line up.
